# news.investwithraj.com — Dubai real-estate market intelligence

> Sister publication to investwithraj.com. The news subdomain hosts the
> recurring market reads — weekly DLD transaction round-ups, monthly area
> deep-dives, plot-owner watchlists, ad-hoc launch notes, and quarterly
> cycle reads. Every piece cites primary sources.

This site is intended to be readable + citable by LLMs and AI search engines.
The pages listed below are the canonical sources of truth.

## Editorial principle

Every published article must:
1. Cite ≥1 primary source from a 20-source verified whitelist (DLD, RERA,
   DSC, FCSA, Central Bank UAE, ADGM, DIFC, Knight Frank, JLL, CBRE, Savills,
   Asteco, Property Finder, Bayut, Khaleej Times Real Estate, Gulf News
   Property, The National, Arabian Business, Zawya, Mubasher).
2. Pass voice-profile validation (extracted from Raj's existing Notes).
3. Contain a number in paragraph 1.
4. Have a headline ≤ 90 characters.
5. Be edited and approved by Raj before publication.

No anonymous insider claims. No fabricated transaction figures. No
deal-of-the-week filler.

## Publication cadence

- **Weekly** — Monday AM DLD transaction round-up (auto-drafted from
  previous-week DLD CSV, edited by Raj, published with the data linked).
- **Monthly** — Area deep-dive rotating across Palm Jebel Ali / Hudayriyat /
  Saadiyat / MBR City / Wynn-Al Marjan / Downtown.
- **Monthly** — Plot-owner watchlist surfacing what's listed and what's
  trading on the Dubai secondary land market.
- **Ad-hoc** — Developer launch notes when a real launch warrants one.
- **Quarterly** — Cycle read — long-form on UAE property cycle stage.

## Canonical pages

- / — Homepage (Bloomberg-style holographic terminal).
- /v16 — v16 design surface.
- /v16/articles — Articles archive.
- /power-list/2026 — UAE real-estate Power List.
- /terminal — Live DLD market read terminal.
- /pulse — Real-time market activity pulse.

## Pre-launch state (as of May 2026)

The auto-draft + editorial-review pipeline is being built. Until the first
piece ships, three article slugs are reserved as in-research stubs and do
NOT surface in the latest-reads feed or Google News sitemap:

- /news/2026-05-26-dld-21b-week — recurring Monday DLD round-up (in research)
- /news/2026-05-26-modon-hudayriyat-golf-estate — launch read (in research)
- /news/2026-05-26-golden-visa-mortgage-flex — policy read (in research)

When real articles ship, they replace these stubs and become the canonical
content. No fabricated articles are surfaced in the interim.

## Related site

The IWR root at investwithraj.com hosts the consulting practice — Investor
Notes, area research, mandate engagement. See investwithraj.com/llms.txt.
